name: Gowa
tagline: Golang WhatsApp - Built with Go for efficient memory use
description:
Golang WhatsApp - Built with Go for efficient memory use

Docs: https://github.com/aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  gowa:
    image: aldinokemal2104/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice:latest
    environment:
      - SERVICE_USER_GOWA
      - SERVICE_PASSWORD_GOWA
      - APP_BASIC_AUTH=ud1379d4129:d6439e91addd8dabaf1bd5cce6f31ba2
      - APP_PORT=3000
      - APP_DEBUG=${APP_DEBUG:-false}
      - APP_ACCOUNT_VALIDATION=${APP_ACCOUNT_VALIDATION:-false}
      - WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK=${WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK}
      - WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_SECRET=${WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_SECRET:-12294139b982fbcc2c75ef5defd6c9ed}
    volumes:
      - gowa_data:/app/storages
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42047:3000
volumes:
  gowa_data: null
